protected abstract void emitWindowClose(P partition, OffsetContext offsetContext)

void processSchemaChange(P partition, OffsetContext offsetContext, DataCollectionId dataCollectionId)

protected void sendWindowEvents(P partition, OffsetContext offsetContext)
protected void sendEvent(P partition, EventDispatcher<P,T> dispatcher, OffsetContext offsetContext, Object[] row)

protected ChangeRecordEmitter

getChangeRecordEmitter(P partition, T dataCollectionId, OffsetContext offsetContext, Object[] row)

classes.name: SignalBasedIncrementalSnapshotChangeEventSource
key_methods: void processMessage(Partition partition, DataCollectionId dataCollectionId, Object key, OffsetContext offsetContext)
protected void emitWindowOpen(P partition, OffsetContext offsetContext)  // INSERT into signal table
protected void emitWindowClose(P partition, OffsetContext offsetContext) // creates WatermarkWindowCloser based on strategy
classes.notes: emitWindowOpen: INSERT INTO signalTable VALUES(chunkId+'-open', OpenIncrementalSnapshotWindow.NAME, metadata). emitWindowClose: delegates to DeleteWindowCloser (INSERT_DELETE strategy) or InsertWindowCloser (INSERT strategy).

classes.name: AbstractIncrementalSnapshotContext<T>
key_methods: void startNewChunk()  // assigns UUID as currentChunkId
void revertChunk()  // chunkEndPosition = lastEventKeySent, windowOpened = false

inner_classes.name: SnapshotDataCollection<T>
inner_classes.notes: Wraps a LinkedList queue; maintains JSON-serialized snapshot of collections for offset storage. Key fields: dataCollectionsToSnapshot (LinkedList), dataCollectionsToSnapshotJson (cached). Methods: add, getNext, peek, size, clear, isEmpty, remove, dataCollectionsAsJsonString, stringToDataCollections.

classes.name: SignalBasedIncrementalSnapshotContext<T>
key_methods: static <U> SignalBasedIncrementalSnapshotContext<U> load(Map<String,?> offsets, boolean useCatalogBeforeSchema)

classes.name: DataCollection<T>
key_methods: Optional<String> getAdditionalCondition()  // wraps in parentheses if non-empty

classes.name: DeleteWindowCloser
fields: private final String signalWindowStatement  // DELETE FROM signalTable WHERE id = ?
key_methods: void closeWindow(Partition partition, OffsetContext offsetContext, String chunkId)  // DELETE WHERE id = chunkId+'-open'

classes.name: InsertWindowCloser
fields: private final String signalWindowStatement  // INSERT INTO signalTable VALUES (?,?,?)
key_methods: void closeWindow(Partition partition, OffsetContext offsetContext, String chunkId)  // INSERT chunkId+'-close', CloseIncrementalSnapshotWindow.NAME, metadata

classes.name: SignalMetadata
classes.notes: Holds openWindowTimestamp and closeWindowTimestamp (Instant). Provides metadataString() serialization.

key_relationships: AbstractIncrementalSnapshotContext composes SnapshotDataCollection (inner class, holds queue of DataCollection<T>)
DataCollection<T> is type-parameterized by DataCollectionId subtype T

watermark_strategy.INSERT_DELETE: emitWindowOpen inserts '{chunkId}-open' row; emitWindowClose deletes '{chunkId}-open' row via DeleteWindowCloser
watermark_strategy.INSERT_INSERT: emitWindowOpen inserts '{chunkId}-open' row; emitWindowClose inserts '{chunkId}-close' row via InsertWindowCloser

key_flows.chunk_read: init/closeWindow/resumeSnapshot → readChunk → preReadChunk → startNewChunk → emitWindowOpen → isTableInvalid → createDataEventsForTable (fills window Map) → emitWindowClose
key_flows.window_close: closeWindow(partition, id, offsetCtx) → context.closeWindow(id) → sendWindowEvents (dispatches rows from window) → readChunk
key_flows.deduplication: processMessage → deduplicateWindow: removes key from window Map if windowOpened==true
key_flows.stop_snapshot: requestStopSnapshot → context.requestSnapshotStop → checkAndProcessStopFlag on next readChunk call

important_notes: Window = LinkedHashMap<Struct, Object[]> holds current snapshot chunk rows keyed by PK struct. deduplicationNeeded() returns windowOpened flag. Schema verification is two-step: save current DB schema in context, verify unchanged in next window. @NotThreadSafe annotation on all concrete classes. Offset storage: EVENT_PRIMARY_KEY, TABLE_MAXIMUM_KEY, DATA_COLLECTIONS_TO_SNAPSHOT_KEY, CORRELATION_ID keys.
